task:
/create_plan i want to create a new featured image for @apps/www/src/content/blog/2026-03-26-why-we-built-lightfast.mdx and replace the currently borrowed featued image from changelog.

as such, let's discuss this.

basically i want this to steal the isometric projections from @packages/app-remotion/src/compositions/landing-hero/

in-fact we steal the middle seciton. the square + lissajous.

without the lined effect.

we follow @packages/app-remotion/src/compositions/changelog-v010-featured/ 's aspect ratio + size
